WITH cust_total AS (SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons FROM yearmonth ym JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment), segment_min AS (SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons FROM cust_total GROUP BY Segment), lowest_customers AS (SELECT ct.Segment, ct.total_cons FROM cust_total ct JOIN segment_min sm ON ct.Segment = sm.Segment AND ct.total_cons = sm.min_cons) SELECT (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM, (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM, (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT CAST(SUM(total_cons) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM lowest_customers WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME

WITH seg_cons AS (SELECT c.Segment, SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012, SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013 FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM') GROUP BY c.Segment), perc AS (SELECT Segment, CASE WHEN cons_2013 <> 0 THEN CAST((cons_2013 - cons_2012) AS REAL) / cons_2013 * 100 ELSE NULL END AS pct_increase FROM seg_cons) SELECT Segment, pct_increase FROM perc WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM perc) OR pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM perc)

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.position > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.raceId) * 100 FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.year >= 2010
